prompt: We got a new brand accent color, #1d9bf0. Add it as a token called brand-blue and wire it up so I can use bg-brand-blue in components.

assertions.text: Adds --color-brand-blue: var(--brand-blue) inside the @theme inline block
Defines the token in both :root and .dark
Runs a contrast check for the new color against a plausible text/background pairing
Does not alter the locked brand tokens or other unrelated tokens
